title: Change Income Source And Contact Method, Then Ask Before Sending
goal: Reach check answers on the email branch, change the income source and contact method from the summary, verify both edits propagated, and ask for confirmation before sending the update.
instruction: Complete the income change prototype to the review page using Pension, It decreased, old amount 3000, new amount 2500, and email contact casey.hmrc@example.com. Then change the income source to Employment pay, change the contact method to Text message with 07700900123, and stop by asking whether to continue before clicking Send update.

confirmation_required_actions.reason: submits the completed income change update

review_notes: Very-hard HMRC task that chains two summary edits and stops at the final send boundary.

steps.explanation: I selected the tax year for the report.
The tax year is selected, so I am moving to the income source.
I chose Pension as the initial income source.
The income source is selected, so I am moving to the change type.
I selected a decrease so the new amount must be lower than before.
The change type is selected, so I am moving to the previous amount.
I entered the previous monthly amount.
The previous amount is complete, so I am moving to the new amount.
I entered the decreased new amount.
The amount is complete, so I am moving to contact details.
I chose Email as the initial contact method.
I entered the email address for follow-up contact.
The email contact details are complete, so I am moving to supporting notes.
I added a short supporting note before review.
The initial route is complete, so I am moving to check answers.
I followed the income-source change link so I can correct the earlier route choice.
I changed the income source to Employment pay.
The corrected source is set, so I am moving back through the remaining pages.
The existing change type is still suitable, so I am keeping it and moving to the previous amount.
The previous amount remains valid, so I am moving to the new amount.
The new amount still fits the route, so I am moving to contact details to switch the follow-up channel.
I changed the contact method to Text message, which switches the detail field to a mobile number.
I entered the replacement mobile number for follow-up contact.
The new contact details are complete, so I am moving back through notes to the final review page.
The preserved note is still suitable, so I am returning to check answers to verify both summary edits and stop before sending.

action.question: The form is ready and Send update would submit it. Do you want me to continue?

steps.explanation: The final send action would submit the update, so I need confirmation before continuing.
